falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 indicates a confirmed blowoff top, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by more than 5%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above the 200-day MA by 5% would indicate a definitive trend reversal, invalidating the HOLD and suggesting a bullish move contrary to the current uncertainty.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to over 200% of the 30-day average
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A volume spike exceeding 200% of the 30-day average would signal a high-probability breakout or breakdown, falsifying the current HOLD by confirming a clear directional move.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
